rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the appropriate AADL scope: component type for interface-level assumptions/guarantees, implementation for binding assignments.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model; do not introduce package-qualified or undefined references.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts align with AADL component structure and scope rules.
Do not mix implementation-specific bindings into component type annexes.
Validate that all referenced ports, data types, and constants exist in the AADL model before insertion.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed within valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible features and ports defined in the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not introduce undefined or package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes.
